Discover Cassia Residences: Luxury Living in the Heart of Coral Gables - YouTube

Tap to unmute

# Cassia Residences

A Rare Opportunity in
Coral Gables

## Cassia is an exciting new address that brings new perspective to upscale Coral Gables living. Captivating and connected, these 174 residences in the heart of the Merrick Park District offer an uptown sophistication and city styling.

[Your Legacy Starts Here](https://cassiamiami.com/#legacy)

## Experience Cassia Residences:

Where Luxury Living Reaches
its Peak. Starting from the $800,000s.

Discover Cassia Residences, a boutique 12-story luxury condominium featuring 174 exquisite residences with turnkey furnishings by RH. Designed for flexible ownership, Cassia offers one, two and three-bedroom residences, spaciously designed with a seamless blend of comfort and elegance ready for immediate use. A captivating address in the center of the Merrick Park District surrounded by lushly landscaped courtyards and curated art in the heart of Coral Gables.

[Building & Amenities](https://cassiamiami.com/building-amenities/)

## Cassia Residences

## More than a Residence,   a Statement.

When you buy at Cassia, you’re securing more than a home — you’re claiming a rare piece of Coral Gables’ legacy. With timeless architecture, bespoke interiors by RH, and an address in The City Beautiful, each residence is a statement of elegance and permanence. This is ownership designed to endure — an asset that blends lifestyle, value, and distinction in one of Miami’s most celebrated neighborhoods.

[See Floor Plans](https://cassiamiami.com/residences-furnished-by-rh/)

# Where Ownership Meets Flexibility

Your Home. Your Terms.

## Welcome to a new era of luxury living where flexibility meets sophistication. Our fully finished and furnished residences offer a seamless blend of comfort and elegance, ready for immediate use. Whether you desire a brief stay or a long-term home, our flexible ownership caters to your every need.

[Learn About Flexible Ownership](https://cassiamiami.com/flexible-ownership/)

Redefining Ownership in

The City Beautiful

## Known as The City Beautiful, Coral Gables is a masterpiece of timeless charm and sophistication. Tree-lined boulevards, Mediterranean architecture, and world-class dining create a lifestyle that feels both refined and vibrant — a rare balance found only here.

### Over an Acre of   Resort-Style Amenities

At Cassia Residences, luxury living is reimagined with an impressive array of amenities designed to enhance every aspect of your lifestyle. Indulge in tranquility at our wellness spa, boost your productivity in our sophisticated business center, and stay fit with our state-of-the-art gym.

[View Amenities Video](https://cassiamiami.com/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjQ4MTciLCJ0b2dnbGUiOmZhbHNlfQ%3D%3D)

![](https://cassiamiami.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/11/01-2.jpg)

"Coral Gables has preserved

its timeless character while

embracing progress."

###### Vince Lago

###### Mayor of Coral Gables

Life is Better in The Gables

#### Coral Gables

## Timeless, Vibrant, Iconic.

When you buy at Cassia, you’re securing more than a home — you’re claiming a rare piece of Coral Gables’ legacy. With timeless architecture, bespoke interiors by RH, and an address in The City Beautiful, each residence is a statement of elegance and permanence. This is ownership designed to endure — an asset that blends lifestyle, value, and distinction in one of Miami’s most celebrated neighborhoods.

[GET TO KNOW THE NEIGHBORHOOD](https://cassiamiami.com/discover-the-city-beautiful/)

# Retail at Its Finest

Luxury, Lifestyle, and Everyday
Convenience

## From the open-air luxury of the Shops at Merrick Park to the vibrant boutiques and dining along Miracle Mile, Coral Gables sets the standard for refined retail. Here, international brands meet local charm, creating a shopping experience that blends sophistication, variety, and ease — all within minutes of Cassia.

#### A Business Hub

## The Economic Power of  Coral Gables.

Coral Gables thrives on more than beauty — it’s fueled by a powerful economy. Home to multinational headquarters, world-class universities, healthcare leaders, and a vibrant financial sector, the city attracts both innovation and stability. With major companies establishing roots here, Coral Gables continues to grow as one of South Florida’s most desirable places to live, work, and invest. At Cassia, you’re not just buying a home — you’re buying into a city powered by enduring economic drivers.

[KNOW THE NEIGHBORHOOD](https://cassiamiami.com/discover-the-city-beautiful/)

What is the walk score of Cassia The Residences?

Cassia The Residences has a walk score of 87, it's very walkable.

What is the transit score of Cassia The Residences?

Cassia The Residences has a transit score of 56, it has good transit.

What schools are assigned to Cassia The Residences?

The schools assigned to Cassia The Residences include Ponce De Leon Middle School, Frances S. Tucker Elementary School, and Coral Gables Senior High School.

What neighborhood is Cassia The Residences in?

Cassia The Residences is in the 33146 neighborhood in Miami, FL.
